◎简　　介  

　　Shop owner Alice Chapman is nervous about meeting her future in-laws at Christmas, especially because she is arriving ahead of her new fiancé, Will Mitchum. Alice's trip becomes more stressful when her luggage is lost and her phone is damaged, leaving her no way to find Will's family!店主爱丽丝查普曼是担心会议在圣诞节她未来的姻亲,尤其是因为她提前到达新的未婚夫,将米彻姆。爱丽丝的旅行变得更加紧张,当她的行李丢失和她的手机损坏,使得她没有办法找到的家人!
introduction: Shop owner Alice Chapman is nervous about meeting her future in-laws at Christmas, especially because she is arriving ahead of her new fiancé, Will Mitchum. Alice's trip becomes more stressful when her luggage is lost and her phone is damaged, leaving her no way to find Will's family!店主爱丽丝查普曼是担心会议在圣诞节她未来的姻亲,尤其是因为她提前到达新的未婚夫,将米彻姆。爱丽丝的旅行变得更加紧张,当她的行李丢失和她的手机损坏,使得她没有办法找到的家人!
